query: Virgin Galactic (SPCE) financing, capital raise, cash position and going concern status in 2026. Has the company raised significant capital or secured funding in Q2 2026 (April-June 2026)? What is their current cash runway?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of my findings on Virgin Galactic (SPCE):

**Going concern & cash runway:** SPCE formally declared **"substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern"** in its Q1 2026 10-Q (filed May 14, 2026), stating existing cash may not fund operations for 12 months. Its cash runway is **less than one year**.

**Cash position:** **$251M** (cash + equivalents + marketable securities) as of March 31, 2026 — down from ~$369M at year-end 2025. Q1 burn was $53.5M operating / –$93.3M free cash flow.

**Q2 2026 financing (the key question):** No single large "significant" raise. Instead, incremental moves:
- **~$52M** raised via ATM equity sales in **April 2026**
- **Debt-for-equity swaps**: redeemed $10M First Lien Notes (May 18) and $30.5M more (June 10, issuing 6.73M shares), leaving ~$172M notes outstanding with no principal due until March 2028
- Additional shelf/ATM registrations (~$40–47M) filed, signaling more dilution capacity ahead

**Bottom line:** The company is "trading dilution for runway" rather than securing a transformative capital injection. It remains dependent on continued external funding to reach its targeted Q4 2026 commercial launch, and the going-concern doubt has not been alleviated.

Note: AskNews tools hit billing/tier limits, so I sourced everything from SEC filings (8-Ks, 10-Q, press releases) and financial news aggregators plus the financial-data MCP tools — all cross-validated.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic (NYSE: SPCE) flags going concern risk despite smaller loss (10-Q)
sources.snippet: Cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash and marketable securities totaled about $250.5 million... Management concluded these resources may not fund planned operations for 12 months and stated substantial doubt about going concern.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Q1 2026 Financial Results Press Release (Exhibit 99.1)
sources.snippet: Cash position remains strong, with cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities of $251 million as of March 31, 2026.

sources.title: SPCE 8-K June 10, 2026 - Unregistered Sales of Equity (First Lien Notes redemption)
sources.snippet: On June 10, 2026, the Company redeemed $30,524,000 in principal of First Lien Notes by issuing 6,734,960 shares; ~$172 million remained outstanding, no principal due until March 31, 2028.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Q1 2026 results cut loss, cash burn (8-K Filing)
sources.snippet: Raised $11 million via 4.0M ATM shares in Q1 and about $52 million more in April; guided Q2 2026 free cash flow to between $(87)M and $(92)M.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic plans stock-for-debt redemption ($30.5M First Lien note redemption) 8-K
sources.snippet: On May 18, 2026, the Company redeemed $10,000,000 of First Lien Notes; June 2 notice to redeem up to $30,523,315 more on June 10, 2026.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Reshapes Finances And Governance Ahead Of 2026 Commercial Flights
sources.snippet: Less than 1 year of cash runway and a track record of substantial dilution mean continued reliance on external funding; converted ~US$30.5m of 9.80% First Lien Notes into equity.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Stock Slides On Q1 Earnings, Company Targets Q4 Spaceflight
sources.snippet: Used $54M in operating activities, negative FCF $93M; ended with $251M total cash and securities; Q2 FCF expected –$87M to –$92M.

sources.title: SPCE Stock Whipsaws As Virgin Galactic Trades Cash For Time
sources.snippet: Swapped $30.5M of 9.80% notes into 6.7M shares leaving ~$172M outstanding; $2.75M insurer-funded governance settlement; $40.21M mixed shelf filing signals more dilution capacity.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Completes Debt-For-Equity Swap — SPCE Stock Slips After-Hours
sources.snippet: On June 10, 2026, redeemed $30.524M of First Lien Notes by issuing 6,734,960 shares; ~$172M notes now remain outstanding.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic (SPCE) - Trefis
sources.snippet: Market Price (7/13/2026): $2.59; 2Y Excess Return -105%, 3Y Excess Return -167%.

sources.title: SPCE 424B3 Prospectus - ATM Program (up to $45.6M via Jefferies)
sources.snippet: Up to $45,588,728.57 of common stock offered via at-the-market program with Jefferies; Jan 8, 2026 share price $3.15.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Reports Earnings Results for Q1 Ended March 31, 2026
sources.snippet: Q1 sales USD 0.227 million vs 0.461 million a year ago; net loss USD 64.72 million; basic loss per share USD 0.81.
